metadata.title:
Farms for Sale


Investors
Look Here!

pages.raw_text:
Do you wish to put in a
fw thousand dollars and
take a half interest in a
stock and fruit farm that
will make you independent
for lifeg Will set out 200
acres of apples and pears; in
one Of the finest localities in
the state, where apples will
equal in color and flavor
those of the Hood River,
Wenatchee and Yakima. An
orchard that will produce
prize apples and be worth
100000 in 48 months. Plen-
ty Of water; close to railroad
town that is growing fast
and will have 5000 popula-
ton in two years. Here is
the finest chance in the APP
pie growing region


This orchard will produce
from $500 to $4,000 per acre
in five years. Figure up
what you will be worth in a
little while from the orchard
alone and then consider a
fine stock and hay ranch
farm with it that is subirri-
gated and needs no atten-
ton. This opportunity for
Monday only. See owner.
